_comment_about_this_file: Minimal Wasabi IAM policy for the production app + worker.
Replace REPLACE_WITH_BOX_OUTBOUND_IP/32 with the prod box's outbound
IPv4. To find it, on the box itself:
If the box egresses through multiple IPs (multi-homed, NAT pool, or
If you cannot pin an IP at all (cloud provider rotates egress), drop
the Condition block, but compensate by:
- using short-lived STS-style keys if Wasabi supports it for your
- rotating the static keys on a tighter schedule (every 30 days),
- logging every PutObject from CloudTrail/Wasabi audit log into a
The bucket name 'photo-prod' must match S3_BUCKET in /etc/photo/env.
If you change the bucket name, change BOTH places.
This policy is the MINIMUM the app needs. Specifically, it does NOT
operations performed by the ops owner, not the app, and live under a
